---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for DevNexus
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🚀 Feature Summary

<!-- One sentence describing the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What pain point or limitation are you hitting?
     e.g. "As a developer, I find it hard to … because …" -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. How should it work from the user's perspective?
     Include any UI/UX ideas, API changes, or workflow descriptions. -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered alternative solutions or workarounds? Why do you prefer your proposed approach? -->

## 📐 Design / Mockups

<!-- If applicable, include wireframes, mockups, or diagrams. Drag-and-drop images here. -->

## 🧩 Affected Areas

<!-- Which parts of DevNexus would this feature touch? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Frontend (Next.js / React)
- [ ] Backend API (FastAPI / Python)
- [ ] Database (Supabase / PostgreSQL)
- [ ] AI / Chronicle engine
- [ ] GitHub integration
- [ ] Hackathon tracker
- [ ] Notes / Editor
- [ ] Todo system
- [ ] Authentication / Auth
- [ ] CI/CD / DevOps
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## 📊 Priority / Impact

<!-- How important is this feature to you? Who would benefit? -->

- **Priority**: <!-- Low / Medium / High / Critical -->
- **Audience**: <!-- All users / Power users / Team leads / etc. -->

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria

<!-- (Optional) List the conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete. -->

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature solves.
- [ ] I am willing to contribute or help test this feature.
